goal: Research and document "missing" or overlooked conspiracy theories and unsolved mysteries. The goal is to find conspiracies that are not commonly discussed in mainstream media but have significant theories or evidence surrounding them. The final output should be a comprehensive, professional report in .docx format saved to the Desktop.

steps.name: Understand & Plan
steps.description: Analyze the task requirements and determine the approach

steps.name: Setup Environment
steps.description: Create any needed directories, files, or configurations

steps.name: Implement Core
steps.description: Create the main output files with complete content

steps.name: Implement Details
steps.description: Create supporting files, styles, data, and logic

steps.name: Verify & Polish
steps.description: Review output, fix issues, and ensure quality

steps.name: Deliver
steps.description: Finalize and notify user of completion
